name: Heatstroke
summary: Body's temperature regulation failing. Risk during hot weather, strenuous exercise, poor adaptation to heat.
recognition: Hot dry skin in severe cases

callEmergency.text: Call 999 if symptoms are severe, confusion is significant, or they don't improve with cooling.

steps: Move them out of the heat — shade or indoors.
Cool damp sheets or a cool shower.

warnings.text: Children are at higher risk in hot weather — keep sessions short, ensure shade and water breaks.
